name: I'm a temp worker at a warehouse in Ogden. Am I still covered by workers comp if I get hurt on the job?
description: Yes. Usually, the staffing agency provides your workers comp coverage. You must report the accident to both the warehouse and your agency immediately to ensure

mainEntity.name: I'm a temp worker at a warehouse in Ogden. Am I still covered by workers comp if I get hurt on the job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Usually, the staffing agency provides your workers comp coverage. You must report the accident to both the warehouse and your agency immediately to ensure your benefits are protected.
